## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, feedback on initial articles, and align on collaboration processes.](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two calibration articles ready for SchoolAI's review; feedback to be provided directly on the documents](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [SchoolAI to share content ideas and meeting insights via Slack for GrowthX to incorporate into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Focus on balancing high-performing keywords with deep, specific content unique to SchoolAI's positioning](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating valuable, user-focused content rather than solely keyword-driven articles](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [Two calibration articles submitted for SchoolAI's review](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Feedback to be provided directly on documents](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Iterative process to establish a "gold standard" template for future articles](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Aim for concise yet detailed formatting, adjustable for different article types](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

### Content Ideation and Collaboration

  - [SchoolAI to share content ideas and meeting insights via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [GrowthX will synthesize and categorize information, incorporating into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Potential use of Notion's transcription feature for efficient idea documentation](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Creation of a "Brain Dump" section in shared Notion for collaborative ideation](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)

### SEO Strategy and Keyword Approach

  - [Balance between high-performing keywords and deep, specific content](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Focus on topical organization and measuring growth within topics](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Shift away from individual keyword ranking towards semantic search optimization](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating valuable, user-focused content that meets search intent](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)

### Technical Setup and Access

  - [SchoolAI to provide GrowthX access to Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [Discussion on potential cancellation of SEMrush subscription](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [SchoolAI to grant access to Framer instance and CMS for content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/wM8uTYkgqWU3hezMx5ux9r3hZ_gfsait?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
